steps.title: Find the lower bound
steps.content:
The pup's mass is at least $\frac{1}{840}$ of the mother's mass.
$$
\frac{86{,}520}{840}=103
$$

steps.title: Write the inequality
steps.content: Since $103$ grams is the smallest predicted mass, the inequality must start with $$ 103\leq p $$ The answer is B.
